description: A ground-level photograph showing the exterior of a greenhouse structure in Almeria (Andalusia, Spain). The structure is covered with a semi-transparent, light-coloured (beige/tan) material, likely plastic sheeting or netting, through which the internal framework is faintly visible. The upper edge of the greenhouse is visible against a clear blue sky with sparse white clouds. The image is attributed with the copyright "© Eurostat LUCAS 2009".
